name: GLM-5
_comment_mla: Multi-head Latent Attention (DSv3-family dimensions): kv_lora_rank → d_c=512, qk_rope_head_dim=64, qk_nope_head_dim=128, v_head_dim=128; q_lora_rank → d_q_c=1536. Per-token-per-layer KV = (512+64) bytes at FP8 = 576 B. n_kv is set to canonical n_q=64 and is ignored when mla is present.
_comment_k_active: 8 routed experts + 1 shared expert (always active). Shared expert approximated by k=9.
_comment_n_moe_layers: first_k_dense_replace=3 → first 3 layers are dense, remaining 75 are MoE.
_comment_caveats: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) with index_topk=2048 not modeled — reduces real attention FLOPs at long context (see attention.md §5); framework treats attention as full O(S) score / value compute over the MLA latent.
